data.scene: User enters the server URL and completes login during onboarding.
data.purpose: Obtain API access tokens to authorize all subsequent data communications.
data.source: Home Assistant server (OAuth2 authorization code flow)
data.item: Bearer Token (access token), Refresh Token, authorization code
data.frequency: One-time at first connection; tokens can be refreshed
data.switchpath: Settings -> Servers -> Log out and re-authenticate
